name: netwitness-get-alerts

outputs.name: There is no context output for this command.

outputs.description: The unique alert identifier NetWitness.Alerts.incidentId The incident ID associated with the alert
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.id

outputs.description: The title or name of the rule that created the alert NetWitness.Alerts.detail The details of the alert. This can be the module name or meta that the module included.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.title

outputs.description: The timestamp of the alert created date NetWitness.Alerts.source The source of this alert. For example, "Event Stream Analysis", "Malware Analysis", and so on.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.created

outputs.description: The risk score of this alert, usually in the range 0 - 100. NetWitness.Alerts.type Type of alert (Network, Log, and so on)
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.riskScore

outputs.description: The source IP address NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.device.port The source port
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.device.ipAddress

outputs.description: The source Ethernet MAC address NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.device.dnsHostname The source DNS resolved hostname
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.device.macAddress

outputs.description: The top-level domain from the DNS resolved hostname (source) NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.user.username The unique username (source)
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.device.dnsDomain

outputs.description: An email address (source) NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.user.adUsername An Active Directory (AD) username (source)
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.user.emailAddress

outputs.description: An Active Directory (AD) domain (source) NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.device.ipAddress The destination IP address
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.user.adDomain

outputs.description: The destination port NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.device.macAddress The destination Ethernet MAC address
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.device.port

outputs.description: The destination DNS resolved hostname NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.device.dnsDomain The top-level domain from the DNS resolved hostname (destination)
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.device.dnsHostname

outputs.description: The unique username (destination) NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.user.emailAddress An email address (destination)
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.user.username

outputs.description: An Active Directory (AD) username (destination) NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.user.adDomain An Active Directory (AD) domain (destination)
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.user.adUsername
